initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT player_name
FROM Player
ORDER BY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Match
    WHERE player_api_id IN (
        home_player_1, home_player_2, home_player_3, home_player_4, home_player_5,
        home_player_6, home_player_7, home_player_8, home_player_9, home_player_10, home_player_11,
        away_player_1, away_player_2, away_player_3, away_player_4, away_player_5,
        away_player_6, away_player_7, away_player_8, away_player_9, away_player_10, away_player_11
    )
) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT player_name
FROM Player
ORDER BY player_api_id IN (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes
    GROUP BY player_api_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
) DESC, player_name
LIMIT 10;

SELECT player_name
FROM Player
ORDER BY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Match
    WHERE Match.home_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X4 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X5 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X9 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X10 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X11 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X4 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X5 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X10 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X11 = Player.player_api_id
) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT player_name
FROM Player
ORDER BY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Match m
    WHERE m.home_player_1 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_2 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_3 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_4 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_5 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_6 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_7 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_8 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_9 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_10 = player_api_id OR m.home_player_11 = player_api_id
       OR m.away_player_1 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_2 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_3 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_4 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_5 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_6 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_7 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_8 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_9 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_10 = player_api_id OR m.away_player_11 = player_api_id
) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT player_name
FROM Player
ORDER BY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Match
    WHERE Match.home_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X4 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X5 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X9 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X10 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.home_player_X11 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X2 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X3 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X4 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X5 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X6 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X7 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X8 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X1 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X10 = Player.player_api_id
       OR Match.away_player_X11 = Player.player_api_id
) DESC
LIMIT 10;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT player_name
FROM Player
ORDER BY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Match
    WHERE player_api_id IN (
        home_player_1, home_player_2, home_player_3, home_player_4, home_player_5,
        home_player_6, home_player_7, home_player_8, home_player_9, home_player_10, home_player_11,
        away_player_1, away_player_2, away_player_3, away_player_4, away_player_5,
        away_player_6, away_player_7, away_player_8, away_player_9, away_player_10, away_player_11
    )
) DESC
LIMIT 10;

candidates.sql:
SELECT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.player_api_id IN (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes
    GROUP BY player_api_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM Player_Attributes
            GROUP BY player_api_id
        )
    )
)
GROUP BY p.player_name
LIMIT 10;

SELECT player_name
FROM Player
WHERE player_api_id IN (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'left' OR preferred_foot = 'right'
    GROUP BY player_api_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
ORDER BY player_name
LIMIT 10;
